# Documentation Rules

## Language

All documentation must be written in English.

Even if the user prompt is written in another language, the output must remain English.

## Documentation locations

Template documents:
docs/template

Generated documents:
docs/output

Temporary drafts:
_bmad-output

## Template usage

Agents must follow the structure of templates.

Example:

Template:
docs/template/prd-template.md

Generated file:
docs/output/prd.md

## Rules

- Never modify files in docs/template
- Always create or update documents in docs/output
- Follow the template structure exactly
